author: Haroen Viaene
subject: fix(insights): don't send view event if search is stalled (#5058)
body:
* fix(insights): don't send view event if search is stalled

The insights view event should only be sent if the hits are different from the ones previously shown, not if the widget renders because of a stalled render.

Alternatively we could memoize-one the call to sendEventToInsights call (https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/blob/99f6fe1dc51e4815e5b9efcfb30e3e2f3127e763/src/lib/utils/createSendEventForHits.ts#L168) or at the beginning of sendEventToInsights in the middleware (https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/blob/55313e4ea4105b777f3f102e9f48a7e440496d25/src/middlewares/createInsightsMiddleware.ts#L144), but that could have negative side-effects, when for example the same hit is clicked twice, it should still send two events

* refactor: move to sendEventForHits

* improve tests with dead search client

* less internals
